title: EchoLib
body:
[ ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebcbbd9f1c108f67e2110b14170753af5b0395e1.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

## Description
EchoLib is a library mod for client-side mods. It contains all the configuration options and most off the other stuff for the mods that are built around EchoLib.
